title: Empty states should guide not greet
summary: AI-generated empty states use generic 'Nothing here yet' with decorative illustration, missing the chance to guide users.
instruction: Every empty state should explain why content is absent, what the user can do, and provide a clear action. Avoid purely decorative illustrations without functional guidance.
rationale: An empty state is a user's first interaction with a feature. Generic empty states waste this opportunity. Effective empty states reduce time-to-value by directing users to the first productive action.

violations: An empty dashboard with illustration of a person looking at an empty box, 'Nothing here yet', subtle 'Get Started' link.
An empty project list with 'No projects' without explanation or creation action.
controls: An empty dashboard with 'Import your first data source' with an illustration of data flowing and a 'Connect Data' button.
An empty project list with 'Create your first project' with a prominent 'New Project' button and template gallery link.
borderline: An error-based empty state ('No results found') where guidance is about refining the query, not creating content.

exceptions.description: Error-based empty states (search no results) where guidance is about refining the query. System-notification panels that are genuinely empty.
examples: No search results page with alternative queries
Disabled feature state with upgrade prompt

detector.signalDescription: Locate empty state sections (centered illustration + heading + optional body + optional CTA). Check if heading explains absence vs generic greeting.
limitations: Some truly empty features have no user action available.
Decorative illustrations are hard to distinguish from functional ones programmatically.

scenarios: A genuinely empty feature where no action exists (disabled feature).
A system notification panel that is empty by nature.
mitigations: Flag only when the empty state has both generic message AND no CTA or a generic CTA.

fixturePlan.description: An empty inbox with illustration of empty envelope, text 'No messages yet', and a 'Browse' link.
Same page showing 'Send your first message' with a 'Compose Message' button.
An empty search result with 'No results for query' with suggestions and 'Clear filters'.

notes: Normalization note: status changed from review-ready to researched. Semantic feasibility is correctly assigned. Pattern matching against generic phrases ('Nothing here yet', 'No * yet') will miss custom implementations and generate false positives for legitimate empty states. The detector is a review trigger, not a definitive finding. Custom implementations may require human review.
